rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces local taxable value for school debt service, affecting district tax rate calculations under Subsection (d) and adjusted value determinations referenced in Subsection (f) via §48.271, requiring consequential amendments.
quote: The district shall deposit the money in the interest and sinking fund for the bonds for which the assistance is received and shall adopt a tax rate for purposes of debt service that takes into account the balance of the interest and sinking fund.
